notes.en: Soak PVDF/NC membrane for 1–5 min after transfer. Rinse with TBS or water to destain. Solution is reusable.
notes.zh: 转膜后浸泡 PVDF/NC 膜 1–5 min，TBS 或水洗即可脱色。可重复使用。

usage.en: Reversible red protein stain for verifying transfer efficiency on western blot membranes.
usage.zh: 可逆红色蛋白染色，用于验证 Western blot 转膜效率。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve Ponceau S (0.1–0.2% w/v) in 5% acetic acid.
Solution can be reused many times; filter if precipitate forms.
